title: Le massaggiatrici

actors: Sylva Koscina, Cristina Gaioni, Valeria Fabrizi
plot: Two industry managers from Milan are in Rome to get the contract to build a YMCA hostel. They get in touch with a masseuses ring and one of the masseuses is introduced to the president of the catholic association as the wife of on...
